title: polyqep: PolyQEP piecewise-continuous modulus framework and PW-R/PW-RG reduced-order models
description: Reference implementation of PolyQEP, a piecewise-continuous modulus framework for frequency-response analysis of structures with frequency-dependent viscoelastic damping, together with the PW-R and PW-RG reduced-order models. Accompanies the manuscript "PolyQEP: A Piecewise-Continuous Modulus Framework and Reduced-Order Models for Efficient Frequency-Response Analysis of Structures with Frequency-Dependent Viscoelastic Damping" (S.-H. Bae, S. Baek, T. Kim, I. Song).

creators.name: Bae, Seung-Hoon
